{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/11484472?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/feiyang666", "id": 11484472, "login": "feiyang666", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjExNDg0NDcy", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/feiyang666", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43533", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Summary

QQBot media tags could read arbitrary local files through reply text.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

QQBot outbound media tags in AI reply text could reference host-local paths outside the intended media storage boundary, allowing local file disclosure through outbound media handling.

## Technical Details

The fix enforces the media storage boundary for all outbound QQBot local file paths.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #63271. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `604777e4414cc3b2ff8861f18f4fb04374c702c6`
- PR: #63271

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @feiyang666 of Tencent zhuque Lab (https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard) for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00369, "percentile": 0.28555}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-66r7-m7xm-v49h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T22:17:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-66r7-m7xm-v49h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-66r7-m7xm-v49h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43533"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T22:17:05Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-66r7-m7xm-v49h", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63271", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/604777e4414cc3b2ff8861f18f4fb04374c702c6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-66r7-m7xm-v49h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-66r7-m7xm-v49h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: QQBot media tags could read arbitrary local files through reply text", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T11:58:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-66r7-m7xm-v49h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: QQBot media tags could read arbitrary local files through reply text
